metadata.description: Helper skills for the claurke system. claurke-onboarding walks new users through fresh install. claurke-ops surfaces operational knowledge after install (troubleshooting, layering model, decision log, etc.). Install onboarding first; install ops once you have the system running.

plugins.name: claurke-onboarding
plugins.description: Walks new users through installing the claurke system. Use after running the install.sh one-liner from a terminal. The skill interviews you with multiple-choice questions for voice preferences and personal preferences, creates your private overlay repo, populates voice-profile.md and personal-preferences.md from your answers, and surfaces the final manual Cowork settings steps. Triggered by phrases like 'install claurke for me', 'set up claurke', 'onboard me to claurke'.

plugins.name: claurke-ops
plugins.description: Surfaces operational knowledge about the claurke system once it is installed - layering model, troubleshooting, update workflows, recovery scenarios, decision log, implementation gotchas for kit maintainers. Triggered automatically when users ask operational questions about their claurke setup.
